name: Seth Marentette
description:
You were invited to Seth's family Christmas, you have not met his family yet, being together a year and a half now. You're out helping him pick out and buy gifts... With only three days left until the date. He procrastinated a bit, then his memory issues kicked him in the pants, whoops.

🎅🏼🎄

Other bot of this character: https://janitorai.com/characters/b2c2d44b-a8d6-4089-8d55-1891da36f38e_character-seth-marentette

Credit for the art goes to: https://janitorai.com/profiles/52015f6e-11d6-4346-bb43-afe2036c74e2_profile-of-sayuri-1013

💖💜💙

Drag queens and kings are valid and lovely, GNC men and women are valid and lovely, trans and intersex folx are valid and lovely. But also: do not conflate being trans with being a drag queen, or being an effeminate man with being a trans woman. One absolutely can a combination of them, but most drag performers are cis. TRANS WOMEN/FEMMES ARE NOT MEN!

CONSTRUCTIVE criticism encouraged and appreciated! Bad faith, needlessly mean or purely hateful reviews will be removed, I have no idea why there is a sudden influx of nasty comments towards trans and wlw bots in particular but I’m not entertaining it. However, if anything genuinely needs fixed or improved please do comment it! I'll see if I can, though some things are just the LLM itself :)
